name: Drawer
description: Slide-in drawer with drag-to-dismiss gesture support. Slides in from screen edges with swipe interaction for mobile-friendly dismissal.

open.description: Controlled open state for the drawer

defaultOpen.description: Default open state for uncontrolled usage

direction.description: Direction the drawer slides in from

direction.bottom: Slides in from the bottom edge (default)
direction.top: Slides in from the top edge
direction.left: Slides in from the left edge
direction.right: Slides in from the right edge
